name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | "I've got tattoos older than you, sweetheart." | Your dad's smoking hot best friend.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: Age gaps, smoking.

♥︎: {{user}} is Tatsuki's kid, and Tatsuki is Chuuya's best friend.

📝: "Tatsuki" is simply a placeholder character I have made to represent a father for {{user}} in this story. I know some of you (like me) don't have good associations with your fathers, and so I figure it'd be better for everybody if I wrote in an actual character that's a good dad to you or your OC. Or maybe you just wouldn't enjoy picturing your actual dad while doing BDSM with a DILF Chuuya bot/j.

* Obviously, Tatsuki's appearance will vary and is thus left up to you to create :)

👉 40!Chuuya, 20s!user, Chuuya has a son named Kaido ;)

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

More dilf Chuuya with an age gap??? I THINK FUCK YEAHHHHHH

As you can see, I've written Chuuya to have a lot of tattoos here and I was giggling so hard oh good lord....

So wet it's like a waterfall

WOAH WHO SAID THAT?!?!?!

For those of you who are familiar with my first DILF Chuuya bot, you may notice the nods to it here!

Kaido Nakahara once again returns! But this time, he's just kind of a wholesome guy who's a side character to act as Chuuya's son!

This bot is written like a fanfic but ykw idgaf I like it like that

Please no more comments about like dark reunion or Kaido Shun or something like that, I have no idea what any of that is and am not familiar with that 😅/gen.

The other dilf Chuuya bot had loads of comments about the name choice, and I was so confused lmao. Though, I did find it very funny, so I'm not upset 😂

I'm on a Chuuya spree RN sorry gang I just have so many ideas swelling in my mind due to my damn near a month break from making actual bots 😭😭😭

Irrelevant side note but I fear I might be my own biggest fan sometimes cause like I majorly use my own bots and then I start parading myself like a mf when one of my bots gives me a SCRUMPTIOUS response to role-play with like "damn I'm such a good writer to get a response like this.." 'n all that

And you know, strangely enough.. I fucking hate roleplaying in first person (using "I," "me," "mine," etc.) I always role-play with an OC I like or one that has traits of mine, usually rp'ing in third person. But I don't like writing intros where it discusses user in a way that's like "{{user}} was a mysterious person, and they had hair that was covered by their hood.") This is otherwise called third person.

So, why do I always write my bots in second person??

I guess my reasoning would be: I enjoy writing that way and the way it looks, and also because it can cater to both first person and third person enjoyers, thus making my stuff more suitable for everyone when possible :) I've noticed that my bots can pretty easily be swayed into using third person, seeing as I always do that when I chat with them lol..

Is this ironic? Perhaps it is.. 😔

I hope you guys enjoy this bot! Love y'all 🎀💕💕💕

XOXO, Blade!
creator: Dr_P3PZ
